raw_news.title: Anthropic CEO says 'no choice' but to challenge Trump admin's supply chain risk designation in court
raw_news.summary: Anthropic said even with the designation, the government can't forbid it from working with companies in other capacities.

raw_news.title: Trump hints U.S. will turn to Cuba after Iran: 'Just a question of time'
raw_news.summary: The Cuba comments show Trump, less than a week into an escalating military conflict in Iran, is considering another major foreign policy move.

raw_news.title: The February jobs numbers are coming out Friday. Here's what to expect
raw_news.summary: Economists surveyed by Dow Jones expect payroll growth of 50,000, following January's surprisingly high 130,000.

raw_news.title: Trump taps Sen. Markwayne Mullin after firing Kristi Noem as DHS secretary
raw_news.summary: Noem's chief advisor, Corey Lewandowski, will also leave his position at DHS, MS Now reported.

raw_news.title: U.S. crude oil tops $80 per barrel as escalating Iran war disrupts global fuel supplies
raw_news.summary: Oil prices have surged about 20% this week as the U.S.-Iran war engulfs the Middle East.

raw_news.title: Trump says Iran wants to ‘make a deal’ to end the war
raw_news.summary: Iran’s foreign minister Abbas Araghchi says the country is not asking for a ceasefire

raw_news.title: Thousands flee Beirut after sweeping Israeli evacuation order
raw_news.summary: Israel orders area of hundreds of thousands of people cleared as war rages with militant group Hizbollah

raw_news.title: Middle East war day 6 as it happened: Azerbaijan says it was struck by Iranian drone, US oil hits highest price since 2024
raw_news.summary: Trump says Tehran wants to ‘make a deal’, but Iran’s foreign minister says the country not asking for a ceasefire

raw_news.title: Depleted oil reserve leaves US exposed as Iran war pushes up prices
raw_news.summary: Donald Trump has not fulfilled a vow to refill the Strategic Petroleum Reserve that was drained by Joe Biden

raw_news.title: US considers tying Nvidia and AMD AI chip exports to foreign investment pledges
raw_news.summary: Draft rule would require countries to invest in America in exchange for advanced semiconductors

raw_news.title: Costco’s stock chart sees first bullish ‘golden cross’ in 3 years as earnings are released
raw_news.summary: A bullish “golden cross” pattern appears in Costco’s stock chart for the first time in nearly three years, on the same day the latest quarterly report is slated to be released.

raw_news.title: This Gap brand continues to be an underperformer, and it is dragging the retailer’s stock
raw_news.summary: The smallest of Gap’s brands continues to be a flash point for investors.

raw_news.title: Marvell’s stock soars as robust AI-driven demand drives an earnings beat
raw_news.summary: Marvell’s stock was up in after-hours trading on Thursday after an upbeat earnings report and full-year guidance.

raw_news.title: Seven REIT stocks pass a strict financial screen, with dividends as high as 6.27%
raw_news.summary: Bally’s Casino in Blackhawk, Colo., is among the facilities owned by Gaming & Leisure Properties, which passed a financial screen of real-estate investment trusts.

raw_news.title: Here’s what’s worth streaming in March 2026 on Netflix, Hulu, HBO Max and more
raw_news.summary: Shows like HBO’s ‘DTF St. Louis’ and ‘Rooster,’ Paramount’s ‘The Madison’ and Netflix’s ‘Peaky Blinders’ movie jump out of the gate as Emmy season gets underway
